event: Effects of Good Government in the City
description: A wide horizontal fresco showing a bustling medieval Italian city in a state of prosperity and order. Multi-story buildings with towers, arches, and balconies fill the upper portion. In the streets below, citizens engage in various activities: women dance in a ring, merchants conduct business, craftsmen work at their trades, horseback riders pass through, and pedestrians walk through the streets. A donkey carries goods. The architecture is detailed and varied, showing the density and vitality of a well-governed city. A Latin inscription runs along the bottom.

_meta.title: Effects of Good Government in the City
